items.title: Why is SOL losing despite Solana beating Hyperliquid on the revenue front?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Despite Solana's revenue success over Hyperliquid, SOL's price decline indicates market sentiment may be influenced by broader factors beyond just revenue.

items.title: Solana grabs 95% of tokenized equity as traders debate if SOL bottom is in
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's dominance in tokenized equity suggests strong ecosystem engagement, but ongoing debates about SOL's price stability could impact investor confidence.

items.title: TradFi fund manager Baillie Gifford introduces Solana, Ethereum tokenized fund with BNY
items.whyYouShouldCare: The introduction of a tokenized fund featuring Solana by Baillie Gifford could enhance institutional interest and liquidity in the Solana ecosystem.
